title: Panic symptoms follow-up
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Supports structured adult panic-disorder diagnosis, history, comorbidity review, panic presentations, and proportionate investigation to exclude acute physical problems before primary-care follow-up.
